_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-T-005 (SP, cosine: 0.450), DG-K-008 (DG, cosine: 0.426).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.492). Shared vocabulary: [analyze, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, policy] vs WIDAI-only terms [actions, activities, ai, assessments, authority, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.910, R=0.850). P exceeds R by 0.060 — the DCWF element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Analyze organizational cyber policy." and "Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisor" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.515 ≈ STS 0.492 (gap 0.022). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [analyze, organizational] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 8.7%. Shared tokens: [analyze, organizational]. DCWF-only: [cyber, policy]. WIDAI-only: [actions, activities, ai, assessments, authority, data].
